titleStmt.title: SII 19.355: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 355. (A.R. No. 147 of 1926.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE VIGHNĒŚVARA SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records the sale of 1/8 vēli of land tax-free, for 24(1/2) kaḻañju and 1 mañjāḍi of gold to a lady by name Baladēvan Iḷaṅgiḍā Sānai by Śrīkaraṇa Tirukkaṟṟaḷip-Pichchaṉ for endowment to the temple of Tiruvēḷvikkuḍi Uḍaiyār for burning a perpetual lamp before god Vigneśvara, through the agency of Tirukkaṟṟaḷip-Pichchaṉ himself. This person is evidently the same as the one mentioned in No. 459 below. The name of the village Viḍēlviḍugudēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam of which Tiruvēḻvikkuḍi formed a part seems to have changed into Gaṅgaikoṇḍa-Chōḷa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam (A.R. No. 108 of 1926).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu
14Āvatu vaṭakaraik kuṟukkaināṭṭu brahma
deyam viṭelviṭukudeviccaturvedima
ṅkalattu tiruveḻvikkuṭiuṭaiyārkku pi
ṟantūr Eccampiyāriṭaik koṇṭa Araikkā
l tiruveḷvikkuṭi śrīkaraṇat tirukkaṟṟaḷip
piccaṉeṉ palateva niḷaṅkiṭā cāṉaikku
Ivvaraikkaāṟ ceyyum Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭut
tu Irupattu ṉāṟkaḻaiñcaraiye Orumañcāṭip poṉ
ṉṉum koṇṭu Ivaḷukkuāka vigneśvar
kku candrādityavaṟ non=tāviḷakkoṉ ṟerippikka
kaṭaveṉāy viṟṟuk kuṭutteṉ palateva niḷaṅki
ṭā cāṉaikku Ippoṉ koṇṭu peThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 19.355 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
